        Rheonda Ogletree created a task for Rheonda Ogletree
        Monday at 2:00 PM
        UPDATE SCREENSHOTS FOR PORTFOLIO

        Rheonda Ogletree sent a LinkedIn message to Joshua Schaffeld (jschaffeld@qualio.com)
        Yesterday at 9:23 PM

        From your experience, what are the core expectations leadership has for AEs & SDRs beyond just hitting quota? What does day-to-day actually look like? And how would you describe the quality of your workload?

        Rheonda Ogletree created a task for Rheonda Ogletree
        Thursday at 2:00 PM
        Follow up with Joshua Schaffeld

        Regarding LinkedIn message logged on Monday, April 6, 2026 9:12 PM

        Rheonda Ogletree sent a LinkedIn message to Joshua Schaffeld (jschaffeld@qualio.com)
        Yesterday at 9:12 PM

        Thank you so much for the recommendations! I'll definitely be reaching out to them both!I’d still love to gain your firsthand insight into the sales environment at Qualio & better understand the expectations of the AE directly from someone in the seat. If you’re open to it, I’d really value continuing the conversation, even briefly.Like, how would you describe the team dynamic at Qualio, specifically in terms of collaboration & how the team supports each other. (I have a few other questions I'm positive you can answer too if you're open..)

        Rheonda Ogletree created a task for Rheonda Ogletree
        Thursday at 2:00 PM
        Follow up with Brett Thorpe

        Regarding LinkedIn message logged on Monday, April 6, 2026 8:46 PM

        Rheonda Ogletree sent a LinkedIn message to Brett Thorpe (bthorpe@qualio.com)
        Yesterday at 8:46 PM

        Hi Brett,Wanted to follow up in case my earlier note got buried. I’m currently breaking into tech sales and was really hoping to connect to learn from your experience as an AE at Qualio.If you’re open to it, I’d value a quick 15-minute conversation to better understand what success looks like on your in your sales org.Appreciate you considering!

        Rheonda Ogletree created a task for Rheonda Ogletree
        Thursday at 2:00 PM
        Follow up with Nathan Graham

        Regarding LinkedIn message logged on Monday, April 6, 2026 7:14 PM

        Rheonda Ogletree sent a LinkedIn message to Nathan Graham (nathan.graham@saviynt.com)
        Yesterday at 7:13 PM

        I appreciate you connecting!As I'm moving further into tech sales, I’m intentionally using this month to improve my understanding of how Solutions Engineers ramp up quickly, make an early impact & create realized value at companies like Saviyant.I’d love to grab 15 minutes to learn from your experience, especially around what’s made you successful there!Also glad to share a bit about myself & my background if helpful.

        Thank You for Applying to Vanta!

        Hi Rheonda, Thank you for applying to the Solutions Engineer, Commercial role at Vanta. We truly appreciate your interest in joining our team. We’re grateful for your interest in Vanta and look forward to the possibility of connecting further.         Last Thursday at 1:19 PM
        Thank you for your application to Smarsh

        Hi applicant,   Thank you for your interest in Smarsh! We wanted to let you know we received your application for Solutions Engineer, and we are delighted that you would consider joining our team.   Our team will review your application and will be in touch if your qualifications match our needs for the role. If you are not selected for this position, keep an eye on our jobs page as we're growing and adding openings.   We encourage you to learn more about Smarsh by:   • Visiting our website on www.smarsh.com   • Following our Social handles on  Smarsh (@SmarshInc) / Twitter , Smarsh | LinkedIn       Best, The Smarsh Team

        Welcome to Sumsub

        Hi, Welcome and thank you for showing an interest in Sumsub. Being connected to our company means you get the chance to let us get to know you even more.  Start by introducing yourself on your personal profile and we will keep you up to date with relevant jobs. Thank you again for considering Sumsub as your next career step! Please, note that this is an automatic reply to confirm that you have connected to our careers page. So we kindly ask that you do not reply directly to it. -- Julia Orlova Head of Talent Acquisition julia.orlova@sumsub.com My LinkedIn Verify the world with one platform THIS E-MAIL AND ANY ATTACHED FILES ARE CONFIDENTIAL AND MAY BE LEGALLY PRIVILEGED.
